overview: SohamxMods is a premium app download platform — a mini Play Store where the admin uploads APK files with icons and metadata, and users can instantly browse, search, and download apps. Features a sleek dark gradient UI with glassmorphism card design.
features: APK and icon file uploads with secure storage
Dynamic public app catalog with instant updates
Search and filter apps by name or description
App detail pages with full metadata
Download counter that increments on each download
Edit and delete apps from the admin dashboard
Dark gradient background with glassmorphism card effects
